hooks.prompt:
Read the hook input JSON from stdin. Extract the file path from tool_input.file_path. If the file path contains 'apps/' and ends with '.html', do the following:
1. Run this command to take a screenshot: npx playwright screenshot 'http://localhost:3456/<path-after-claude-code-book-template>' /tmp/ui-check-latest.png --wait-for-timeout 2000
   (replace <path-after-claude-code-book-template> with the part after 'claude-code-book-template/' in the file path)
2. Read the screenshot file at /tmp/ui-check-latest.png
3. Review the UI for design issues including:
   - Layout, alignment, spacing, anything that looks broken or inconsistent
   - AKKODiS BRAND VIOLATIONS (report as NG if found):
     * Colors: Only 5 brand colors allowed: #001f33, #ffb81c, #00ffff, #000000, #ffffff (and their 20/40/60/80% tones). Any other color (e.g. #fffbf0, #fde89a, #f0faf4, #fafbfc, #e8ecf0) is NG.
     * No border-radius on rectangular shapes (border-radius: 50% for circles is OK)
     * No colored border on colored shapes (e.g. yellow border on white box is NG; only neutral gray border or border-left accent is OK)
     * Wide yellow or cyan backgrounds are NG — use navy or white as background; yellow/cyan for accents only
4. Return a SHORT review (3-5 lines max) as hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext. List each NG item on its own line.

If the file is NOT in apps/ or NOT .html, output nothing and exit 0.

hooks.command:
echo 'IMPORTANT REMINDERS:
- Brand colors only: #001f33 / #ffb81c / #00ffff / #000000 / #ffffff (and 20/40/60/80% tones)
- No border-radius on rectangles
- No colored border on colored shapes
- Wide yellow/cyan backgrounds are NG — use navy/white as background
- Update WHAT'S NEW in index.html at the end of each session'
